instructions: Step 1: Locate the bet display in the bottom-right area.
Step 2: Read current bet value — record as starting_bet.
Step 3: Click the '+' button labeled 'Bet Increase' (or '-') until the bet display shows '25.00' (coin 5 × 5 paylines).
Step 4: Verify the bet display reads exactly '25.00' (within ±1 ladder step tolerance).
